description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a slim build, standing upright with arms relaxed and slightly extended at his sides. He is dressed in casual attire, featuring a long-sleeve shirt and fitted jeans, paired with low-profile sneakers. His facial features are visible from the front, and his hair is short and neatly styled. The clothing fits closely to the body, with no visible accessories or carried items. The overall appearance is typical of an urban street user, suitable for a variety of city environments. The figure's posture and attire suggest he is at rest, possibly waiting or observing his surroundings.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian standing upright with arms relaxed, wearing a long-sleeve shirt, jeans, and sneakers. The figure has short hair and a slim build, with no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, chest, and both arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, body, and the relaxed position of the left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and both arms hanging naturally.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, body, and the relaxed position of the right arm.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and fitted jeans
